scripts.test:desktop:warp-ui: node --test --test-name-pattern='^warp controls commit mode, amount, and MSEG depth on the desktop harness$' tests/test_desktop_patch_view_browser.mjs
scripts.test:desktop:filter-ui: node --test --test-name-pattern='^(filter controls commit mode, cutoff, Q, and MSEG depth on the desktop harness|desktop filter graph follows live effective filter state and falls back to the base controls)$' tests/test_desktop_patch_view_browser.mjs
scripts.warp:update-reference: npm run warp:fixtures:update-inputs && npm run warp:reference:update
scripts.test:cmajor:warp: npm run test:python:warp-alias && npm run test:desktop:warp-ui && cmaj test --singleThread --sessionID=1 tests/cmajor_warp
scripts.test:cmajor:filter: npm run test:python:filter-stability && npm run test:desktop:filter-ui && cmaj test --singleThread --sessionID=1 tests/cmajor_filter
